title: <div><tt>I enjoyed reading your post. I liked how you mentioned all these lines
content:
I enjoyed reading your post. I liked how you mentioned all these lines from the text to better understand your point of view. You have definitely enforced the theme of perseverance and sacrifice with supporting text from the reading. She keeps pushing forward, no matter how hard it gets. She walks this difficult path repeatedly, driven by love and loyalty, showing that true strength comes from her selflessness.

I personally was surprised by the encounter she had with the doctor. I did not have the same though as you but definitely opened my mind a little more. I thought the doctor part was a memory she was having while sitting on the log. Now I understand that she made did in fact make it to the doctor's office but that her grandson was just a memory that kept her alive and kept her moving forward to preserver her difficult path, where are her path was her everyday life to survive.


from Week 5 Discussion
Feb 10, 2025 5:04PM
Lorena Ramos Rodriguez
Hi Brandon,
